Platform: Mobile in-app banner
Required canvas: 1080 x 566 px
Required aspect ratio: 1.91:1 horizontal
Old conflicting platform to ignore: 4:5 social feed 1080 x 1350.
Top safe zone: 40 px.
Bottom safe zone: 48 px.
Side safe margin: 56 px.
Logo: top-left inside mobile banner safe margin.
CTA: right side button inside safe margin.
Text density: no more than 6 short text blocks; headline should be largest and at most 2 lines.
Hero: must stay readable without covering CTA, disclosure, or source line.
